response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical breadth across languages and systems, and clear leadership in open-source and mentoring — but lacks explicit evidence of building enterprise-scale experimentation or growth platforms with AI-first telemetry, feature flagging, or cross-team measurement systems as required.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, C++, and Python-like ecosystems
Proven track record in building scalable infrastructure (e.g., real-time data systems, Kubernetes deployments)
Strong mentorship and open-source contributions demonstrating technical influence and communication skills
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or shipping experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or growth measurement systems
Limited visibility into AI-driven engineering velocity or statistical analysis of experiments
Experience with distributed systems is present but not explicitly tied to global, high-availability growth platforms
